description: Visual Themes — HOW the image looks. Lighting, background style, mood, materials, spatial depth, and motion define the complete artistic direction.
rule: Pick ONE lighting, ONE background style, ONE mood, 1-2 materials, 1-2 spatial depth techniques, and 1 motion type per card. They must work together harmoniously and support the product category. Use category_matching for guidance.

lighting.name: Soft Studio
lighting.description: Soft diffused studio lighting. Even illumination. Clean commercial look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Soft diffused studio lighting with even illumination. No harsh shadows. Clean commercial product photography lighting.

lighting.name: Dramatic Spotlight
lighting.description: Focused spotlight creating drama. Deep shadows. High-end advertising look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Dramatic focused spotlight on the product. Deep luxury shadows in the background. High-end commercial advertising lighting with strong light direction.

lighting.name: Natural Daylight
lighting.description: Soft natural daylight through large windows. Warm and inviting. Lifestyle photography.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Soft natural daylight streaming through large windows. Warm natural color temperature. Lifestyle photography lighting that feels authentic and inviting.

lighting.name: Dark Moody
lighting.description: Dark background with selective light on product. Moody atmosphere. Luxury feel.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Dark moody lighting with selective illumination on the product only. Moody sophisticated atmosphere. The darkness around the product creates mystery and luxury.

lighting.name: High Contrast
lighting.description: Strong dark-light contrast. Bold shadows. Dramatic premium look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: High contrast lighting with strong dark-light separation. Bold defined shadows. Dramatic premium product photography. The contrast makes the product pop.

lighting.name: Golden Hour
lighting.description: Warm golden light. Sunset quality. Lifestyle and beauty products.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Warm golden hour lighting. Sunset-quality golden tones. Beautiful warm light wrapping around the product. Lifestyle and beauty photography lighting.

lighting.name: Rim Light
lighting.description: Edge light defining product silhouette. Dark background. Premium tech look.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Rim lighting defining the product edges and silhouette. Dark background. Premium technology product look. The edge light separates the product from darkness elegantly.

lighting.name: Softbox Diffused
lighting.description: Large softbox overhead. Very soft shadows. Clean e-commerce standard.
lighting.prompt_fragment: Large softbox diffused lighting from above. Very soft barely-visible shadows. Clean e-commerce standard lighting. The most flattering product lighting.

background_style.name: Pure White
background_style.description: Pure white seamless background. Clean marketplace standard. Amazon style.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Pure white seamless background (#FFFFFF). Ultra clean. Amazon and Trendyol main image standard. Product is the only thing visible.

background_style.name: Premium Gradient
background_style.description: Luxury gradient background. Smooth color transition. High-end cosmetic/tech aesthetic.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Luxury smooth gradient background. Elegant color transition that complements the product. High-end cosmetic and technology brand aesthetic. No hard edges.

background_style.name: Dark Studio
background_style.description: Dark premium studio background. Product emerges from darkness. Luxury feel.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Dark premium studio background. Deep charcoal or black. Product illuminated to emerge from the darkness. Luxury high-contrast presentation.

background_style.name: Marble Surface
background_style.description: Premium marble surface. White or dark marble. Luxury reflections underneath.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Premium marble surface as base. White Carrara or dark marble with natural veining. Luxury reflections visible on the polished stone. High-end retail display quality.

background_style.name: Wood Surface
background_style.description: Rich wood surface. Warm tones. Craftsmanship feel. Natural texture.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Rich natural wood surface. Warm wood tones with visible grain texture. Craftsmanship and quality feeling. The organic texture contrasts beautifully with the product.

background_style.name: Metal Surface
background_style.description: Brushed metal surface. Industrial premium. Modern tech feel.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Brushed metal surface with subtle grain. Industrial premium feel. Modern technology aesthetic. Cool tones with metallic reflections.

background_style.name: Glass Surface
background_style.description: Glass surface with reflections. Clean and modern. Premium minimal.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Glass surface with subtle premium reflections. Clean modern minimal aesthetic. The transparency and reflections add depth and sophistication.

background_style.name: Environmental
background_style.description: Real environment matching product category. Kitchen, bathroom, office, etc.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Real environmental background matching the product's natural use context. Appropriate to product category. The environment supports the product story without distracting.

background_style.name: Abstract Technology
background_style.description: Abstract technology background. Subtle glow patterns. Electronics and innovation.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Abstract technology background with subtle glowing elements. Circuit-like or geometric patterns barely visible. Modern electronics and innovation aesthetic. Dark with tech accents.

background_style.name: Editorial Backdrop
background_style.description: Textured photography backdrop. Magazine quality. Fashion and lifestyle.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Textured premium photography backdrop. Canvas or subtle fabric texture. Magazine editorial quality. Fashion and lifestyle product photography standard.

background_style.name: Blurred Lifestyle
background_style.description: Real interior scene with a person naturally present (not interacting with product). Heavily blurred bokeh. Product is the only sharp element.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Background is a real modern interior (home, office, cafe, or store) with a person naturally present in the scene — not holding or using the product, just part of the environment. The ENTIRE background is heavily blurred with shallow depth of field (bokeh, f/1.4). The person and environment are soft, atmospheric, and do NOT compete with the product. The product in the foreground is the ONLY sharp element. The blurred person adds life and context without distraction.

background_style.name: Blurred Usage Context
background_style.description: Real environment where a person is actively USING the product. Heavily blurred. Product in foreground is sharp and separate.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Background shows the natural usage environment where a person is actively using or applying THIS exact product type — e.g. someone blow-drying hair (for a hair dryer), someone cooking (for kitchenware), someone exercising (for fitness gear). The person and environment are HEAVILY BLURRED (bokeh, f/1.4). The product in the foreground is sharp, isolated, and treated as the infographic hero — it is the SAME product as the one being used in the blurred background. The blurred usage scene provides emotional context and proof of real-world value.

background_style.name: Blurred Lifestyle Holding
background_style.description: Real scene where a person is holding or directly interacting with THIS product. Heavily blurred. Foreground product is sharp and separate.
background_style.prompt_fragment: Background shows a person naturally holding, touching, or directly interacting with THIS product — the exact same product that appears sharp in the foreground. Depending on the product type: for handheld items (fan, phone, tool) the person holds it; for wearable items (headphones, watch) the person wears it; for cosmetic items the person applies it; for desktop items the person's hands are near it. The person and their interaction are HEAVILY BLURRED (bokeh, f/1.4). The foreground product is the SAME product — sharp, detailed, and treated as the infographic hero. The blurred interaction shows the product 'in real life' while the sharp foreground shows it in full commercial detail.

mood.name: Minimal Luxury
mood.description: Lots of negative space. Very expensive feeling. High-end brand aesthetic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Minimal luxury mood. Abundant negative space creating an expensive exclusive feeling. Less is more. High-end fashion brand aesthetic. The emptiness communicates value.

mood.name: Editorial / Vogue
mood.description: Magazine editorial quality. Fashion-forward. Aspirational and beautiful.
mood.prompt_fragment: Editorial magazine mood — Vogue quality. Fashion-forward aesthetic applied to product photography. Aspirational, beautiful, dramatic. The product is the supermodel.

mood.name: Technology / Innovation
mood.description: Modern technology feeling. Innovation and progress. Cutting-edge aesthetic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Technology innovation mood. Modern cutting-edge feeling. The aesthetic communicates progress, advancement, and future-forward thinking. Clean and intelligent.

mood.name: Warm & Cozy
mood.description: Warm inviting atmosphere. Comfort and home. Natural and authentic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Warm cozy mood. Inviting comfortable atmosphere. Home and hearth feeling. Natural authentic warmth. The image feels like a warm hug.

mood.name: Dynamic / Action
mood.description: Energy and movement. Exciting and vibrant. Commercial action aesthetic.
mood.prompt_fragment: Dynamic action mood. Energy and movement frozen at the perfect moment. Exciting vibrant commercial aesthetic. The image feels alive and in motion.

mood.name: Clean & Clinical
mood.description: Pristine and precise. Laboratory clean. Scientific precision feel.
mood.prompt_fragment: Clean clinical mood. Pristine and precise like a laboratory. Everything perfectly ordered. Scientific precision aesthetic. The cleanliness communicates quality control.

mood.name: Industrial Premium
mood.description: Raw materials meets luxury. Factory-to-premium aesthetic. Authentic craftsmanship.
mood.prompt_fragment: Industrial premium mood. Raw authentic materials meeting luxury presentation. Workshop-to-showroom aesthetic. The mood communicates honest craftsmanship and authentic quality.

mood.name: Scandinavian
mood.description: Nordic minimalism. Light wood, white, clean lines. Calm and balanced.
mood.prompt_fragment: Scandinavian design mood. Nordic minimalism with light tones, natural materials, and clean lines. Calm balanced aesthetic. Function meets beauty in the simplest way.

mood.name: Classic Luxury
mood.description: Traditional luxury. Gold accents, rich textures. Timeless elegance.
mood.prompt_fragment: Classic luxury mood. Traditional premium aesthetic with subtle gold or brass accents and rich textures. Timeless elegance that never goes out of style. Heritage quality feeling.

mood.name: Modern Sleek
mood.description: Contemporary modern design. Sleek surfaces. Urban sophistication.
mood.prompt_fragment: Modern sleek mood. Contemporary design aesthetic with smooth surfaces and clean geometry. Urban sophistication. The mood communicates current design trends and metropolitan taste.

materials.name: Matte Frosted Glass
materials.description: Frosted matte glass panels and surfaces. Soft diffused transparency. Modern premium look.
materials.prompt_fragment: Matte frosted glass elements in the background — semi-transparent glass panels with soft blurred edges. Glassmorphism design aesthetic. Sophisticated modern look.

materials.name: Clear Acrylic
materials.description: Transparent acrylic plates and pedestals. Crystal-clear precision. High-end retail display quality.
materials.prompt_fragment: Clear transparent acrylic surfaces and pedestals. Crystal-clear like museum display quality. Light passes through creating subtle refractions. Premium retail display aesthetic.

materials.name: Brushed Chrome
materials.description: Brushed chrome and polished metal surfaces. Cool reflective tones. Technology and automotive feel.
materials.prompt_fragment: Brushed chrome and polished metal background elements. Cool silver-blue reflective surfaces. Technology and precision engineering feel. Light catches the metal grain creating subtle linear highlights.

materials.name: Liquid Metal
materials.description: Flowing liquid metal forms. Organic metallic curves. Futuristic premium.
materials.prompt_fragment: Liquid metal flowing forms — organic metallic curves that look like mercury frozen in motion. Futuristic premium aesthetic. The metal appears to flow and ripple creating mesmerizing reflections.

materials.name: Carbon Fiber
materials.description: Carbon fiber texture and weave pattern. Motorsport heritage. High-performance feel.
materials.prompt_fragment: Carbon fiber textured surfaces with visible weave pattern. Dark charcoal with subtle grid texture. Motorsport and high-performance engineering feel. Lightweight strength aesthetic.

materials.name: Satin Fabric
materials.description: Soft satin fabric draping. Silk-like smooth surface. Beauty and fashion products.
materials.prompt_fragment: Soft satin fabric draped elegantly in the background. Silk-like smooth surface catching soft highlights. Luxury fashion and beauty product feel. The fabric folds create natural gentle shadow gradients.

materials.name: Polished Aluminum
materials.description: Polished aluminum surfaces. Clean industrial precision. Apple-like design language.
materials.prompt_fragment: Polished aluminum surfaces with clean precision-machined edges. Apple-design-language aesthetic. Silver-white metallic with subtle warm undertone. Modern industrial elegance.

materials.name: Premium Ceramic
materials.description: Smooth ceramic surfaces. Pure white or dark matte. Spa and bathroom luxury.
materials.prompt_fragment: Smooth premium ceramic surfaces — pure white or deep matte black. Spa-like luxury feel. The ceramic has a subtle organic warmth despite being perfectly smooth. High-end bathroom and wellness aesthetic.

materials.name: Glossy Lacquer
materials.description: High-gloss lacquered surfaces. Mirror-like reflections. Luxury retail and cosmetics.
materials.prompt_fragment: High-gloss lacquered surfaces with mirror-like reflections. Deep rich color with wet-look shine. Luxury cosmetics and premium retail display aesthetic. The gloss creates dramatic light reflections.

materials.name: Natural Stone
materials.description: Raw or polished natural stone. Granite, slate, travertine. Earthy premium.
materials.prompt_fragment: Natural stone surfaces — granite, slate, or travertine. Raw or lightly polished. Earthy premium aesthetic with natural color variation and texture. The stone communicates permanence and natural quality.

materials.name: Rich Walnut Wood
materials.description: Dark rich walnut wood. Visible grain. Warm premium. Craftsmanship and heritage.
materials.prompt_fragment: Rich dark walnut wood surface with visible organic grain. Warm brown tones. Heritage craftsmanship feel. The wood communicates quality, tradition, and natural authenticity. Workshop-to-showroom aesthetic.

materials.name: Soft-Touch Rubber
materials.description: Matte soft-touch rubber-like surfaces. Modern ergonomic feel. Sports and fitness.
materials.prompt_fragment: Matte soft-touch rubber-like background surfaces. Subtle slightly-textured matte finish. Modern ergonomic product feel. Sports, fitness, and active lifestyle aesthetic. The surface looks grippy and premium.

spatial_depth.name: Multi-Layer Glass Panels
spatial_depth.description: Multiple semi-transparent glass panels at different depths. Glassmorphism depth effect.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Multiple semi-transparent glass panels layered at different depths in the composition. Some closer, some further back. Each layer catches light differently. Glassmorphism depth effect — the image has clear foreground, midground, and background separation through transparent surfaces.

spatial_depth.name: Volumetric Light Rays
spatial_depth.description: Visible light rays cutting through space. Volumetric god rays. Cinematic depth.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Visible volumetric light rays cutting diagonally through the composition. Cinematic god rays creating depth layers. Light becomes a physical element in the scene. The rays separate foreground from background dramatically.

spatial_depth.name: Floating Geometric Forms
spatial_depth.description: Large abstract geometric shapes floating at different depths. Premium advertising poster feel.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Large abstract geometric shapes (rings, circles, soft cubes) floating at different depths in the composition. Some in sharp focus near the product, others softly blurred in the background. Premium advertising poster depth. The shapes create a rich spatial environment without distracting from the product.

spatial_depth.name: Liquid Abstract Forms
spatial_depth.description: Flowing liquid-like abstract shapes. Organic waves and curves. Modern artistic depth.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Flowing liquid-like abstract forms and organic waves curving through the composition at different depths. Soft gradient colors. Modern artistic depth — the forms create a sense of flowing space around the product. Beauty and premium aesthetic.

spatial_depth.name: Neon Glow Lines
spatial_depth.description: Thin neon-like glowing lines at different depths. Technology and modern aesthetic.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Thin neon-like glowing lines running through the composition at different depth planes. Some lines sharp, others softly glowing and blurred. Technology and modern electronic aesthetic. The glowing lines create a futuristic spatial grid that adds depth without clutter.

spatial_depth.name: Soft Mist / Fog Layers
spatial_depth.description: Layers of soft atmospheric mist separating depth planes. Dreamy premium look.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Layers of soft atmospheric mist or fog separating different depth planes in the composition. The mist creates natural depth separation — foreground sharp, midground softened by light haze, background dreamy and atmospheric. Premium cinematic depth.

spatial_depth.name: Acrylic Light Halos
spatial_depth.description: Soft luminous halos behind or around the product. Acrylic panel glow. Premium spotlight effect.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Soft luminous light halos behind and around the product — like light passing through frosted acrylic panels. The halos create a natural spotlight effect that separates the product from the background with glowing depth. Premium commercial advertising look.

spatial_depth.name: Infinite Reflection Floor
spatial_depth.description: Highly reflective floor surface creating mirror reflections. Infinity pool effect. Luxury depth.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Highly reflective floor surface beneath the product creating a mirror-like reflection extending downward. The reflection creates an infinity-pool depth effect — the product appears to float above its own reflection. Luxury commercial photography depth.

spatial_depth.name: Particle Atmosphere
spatial_depth.description: Tiny floating particles suspended in space at various depths. Dust motes, sparkles, or light fragments.
spatial_depth.prompt_fragment: Tiny floating particles suspended throughout the composition at various depths — some sharp and near, others tiny and distant. Dust motes catching light, subtle sparkles, or light fragments. The particles reveal the depth of the space and add cinematic atmosphere.

motion.name: Dynamic Diagonal Lines
motion.description: Strong diagonal composition lines creating forward energy. Sport and action feel.
motion.prompt_fragment: Strong diagonal composition lines running through the image — from bottom-left to top-right or vice versa. These diagonals create a sense of forward momentum and dynamic energy. Even though the product is static, the surrounding composition feels alive and moving.

motion.name: Floating Ascending Elements
motion.description: Small decorative elements floating upward as if lifted by gentle wind. Magical premium feel.
motion.prompt_fragment: Small decorative elements (light fragments, subtle sparkles, tiny geometric shapes) floating gently upward around the product as if lifted by an invisible breeze. The ascending motion creates a magical premium feeling — the product appears light, desirable, elevated above the ordinary.

motion.name: Frozen Motion Moment
motion.description: Elements caught mid-motion — water droplets, particles, fabric. High-speed photography feel.
motion.prompt_fragment: Elements caught frozen mid-motion — water droplets suspended in air, fabric mid-sway, particles stopped at peak action. High-speed photography aesthetic. The frozen moment creates tension and energy — the viewer senses the motion even though the image is still.

motion.name: Swirling Flow
motion.description: Soft swirling energy lines wrapping around the product. Fluid dynamic movement.
motion.prompt_fragment: Soft swirling energy lines or light trails wrapping gently around and behind the product in a fluid spiral pattern. The swirls create a sense of flowing energy and dynamic movement. The product sits at the calm center of an energetic vortex. Beauty and premium aesthetic.

motion.name: Radial Burst
motion.description: Lines and elements radiating outward from the product center. Explosive energy.
motion.prompt_fragment: Subtle lines and light elements radiating outward from the product as the center point. A controlled radial burst of energy — not chaotic but directed. The product appears to emit power and presence. Technology and premium sports aesthetic.

motion.name: Gentle Drift
motion.description: Very subtle slow drift feeling. Elements barely moving. Calm premium atmosphere.
motion.prompt_fragment: Very subtle gentle drift feeling — elements barely shifting as if in slow motion underwater. Calm, peaceful movement. The product sits in perfect stillness while the surrounding atmosphere drifts slowly. Luxury spa and wellness aesthetic.

motion.name: Wave Pulse
motion.description: Concentric wave rings emanating from the product. Sound-wave or water-ripple effect.
motion.prompt_fragment: Concentric wave rings or pulses emanating outward from the product — like sound waves or water ripples frozen in time. The waves create a sense of the product's presence spreading through space. Technology and audio product aesthetic.

motion.name: Absolute Stillness
motion.description: No motion at all. Perfect stillness. Museum quality. The product commands complete silence.
motion.prompt_fragment: Absolute perfect stillness. No motion whatsoever. Museum-display quality where the product commands complete visual silence. The stillness itself communicates confidence and premium quality. Nothing moves because nothing needs to — the product speaks for itself.

Elektronika.atmosphere: Cool sophisticated technology atmosphere. Glass, metal, precision engineering. The product feels advanced, capable, and cutting-edge.

Kosmetika.atmosphere: Soft luxurious beauty atmosphere. Liquid forms, silk-like materials, gentle diffused lighting. The product feels desirable, elegant, and transformative.

Məişət texnikası.atmosphere: Clean functional atmosphere. Polished surfaces, natural materials, organized precision. The product feels reliable, essential, and perfectly designed for daily life.

Mətbəx.atmosphere: Warm inviting kitchen atmosphere. Natural wood, stone, ceramic. The product feels essential to a beautiful cooking experience. Home and hearth warmth.

İdman.atmosphere: Energetic dynamic atmosphere. Carbon, rubber, metal. The product feels powerful, explosive, ready for action. Frozen at peak performance.

Uşaq malları.atmosphere: Bright friendly atmosphere. Soft rounded forms, gentle colors, floating playful elements. The product feels safe, fun, and joy-bringing.

Ofis malları.atmosphere: Clean professional atmosphere. Aluminum, glass, wood. The product feels productive, organized, and essential for modern work.

Aksesuarlar.atmosphere: Premium accessory atmosphere. The product complements and enhances. Elegant supporting role with its own beauty. Fashion and lifestyle aesthetic.

Avto.atmosphere: Powerful automotive atmosphere. Chrome, carbon, metal. The product feels engineered for performance. Garage-to-track energy.
